info.description: Use dice to bid on cryptocurrency where the value is constantly fluctuating and the chain can fork at any time.
info.helpText: Players take seats and press the Setup button. Then put the cursor over the "Hover for game information" button for an explanation of how to use this implementation.

aid1.detail:
Consolidation Gaps Between Cards
3 players: Consolidate cards that have a value gap of 3 or less.
4 & 5 players: Consolidate cards that have a value gap of 4 or less.
Game Terminology
HARDFORK Cards: These are the cards that say 'Min x2'.
STABLE COIN Cards: These are the cards that say 'Min x1'.
Others +/- #: All non-winning players increase/lower the value of all of the dice on their held cards by the shown number.
Others -die: All non-winning players remove the single lowest die from every one of their held cards.
How To Use This Implementation
Setting up the auction: Draw 2 cards from the Draw Deck. Place the card with the lower No.# into the Current Auction area, and place the other card into the Future Auctions area. Once the Draw Deck is empty, shuffle the Future Auctions cards and put them into the Draw Deck. From now on, just draw 1 card from the Draw Deck and place it into the Current Auction area.
Bidding in an auction: Drag dice from your colored holder into the white area to the left. Modify the die value by clicking on them.
Modifying Scores: Click on the score number and input the value change in the pop-up box.
+ & - buttons next to dice holder: Click to increase/decrease the value of all held dice by 1. Decreasing from 1 to 0 moves the die to your holder. Increasing from 6 does nothing.
Modifying Scores: Click on the score number and input the value change in the pop-up box.
